title: Mobile Developer
description: Build native and cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android. Covers React Native, Flutter, state management, APIs, and publishing to app stores.

nodes.title: Choose a Framework
nodes.description: React Native (JavaScript/TypeScript) or Flutter (Dart) — both are excellent for cross-platform mobile development.

nodes.title: Language Fundamentals
nodes.description: JavaScript/TypeScript for React Native or Dart for Flutter — variables, async, OOP, and collections.

nodes.title: UI Components & Layouts
nodes.description: Build UIs with built-in components — Flexbox layout, navigation, lists, forms, and platform-specific styling.

nodes.title: Navigation & Routing
nodes.description: Screen navigation, deep linking, tab navigation, drawer navigation, and navigation patterns.

nodes.title: State Management
nodes.description: Context, Redux, Zustand, or MobX (React Native) / Provider, Riverpod, BLoC (Flutter).

nodes.title: API Integration
nodes.description: Fetch data from REST/GraphQL APIs, handle loading/error states, and implement data caching.

nodes.title: Local Storage & Persistence
nodes.description: AsyncStorage, SQLite, Realm, or SecureStorage for offline data and sensitive data.

nodes.title: Authentication
nodes.description: Implement auth flows — JWT, OAuth, biometric auth, and social login (Google, Apple, Facebook).

nodes.title: Push Notifications
nodes.description: FCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging), APNs, local notifications, and notification handling.

nodes.title: Device Features
nodes.description: Camera, GPS/Location, accelerometer, contacts, and other native device APIs.

nodes.title: Animations & Gestures
nodes.description: Smooth animations, gesture handling, shared element transitions, and Lottie animations.

nodes.title: Mobile Testing
nodes.description: Unit tests, component tests, integration tests, and E2E tests with Detox or Maestro.

nodes.title: Performance Optimization
nodes.description: List virtualization, memoization, bundle size optimization, Hermes engine, and profiling.

nodes.title: App Build & Signing
nodes.description: Build APK/AAB for Android and IPA for iOS. Code signing, provisioning profiles, and keystore management.

nodes.title: App Store Publishing
nodes.description: Submit to Google Play Store and Apple App Store — screenshots, descriptions, privacy policies, and review guidelines.

nodes.title: CI/CD for Mobile
nodes.description: Automated builds, tests, and deployments with GitHub Actions, Fastlane, or Bitrise.

nodes.title: Firebase / BaaS
nodes.description: Firebase suite — Firestore, Auth, Storage, Analytics, Crashlytics, and Cloud Functions.

nodes.title: Internationalization (i18n)
nodes.description: Multi-language support, RTL layouts, localized strings, and date/number formatting.

nodes.title: Native Modules (Advanced)
nodes.description: Write native iOS (Swift/ObjC) or Android (Kotlin/Java) modules and bridges.

nodes.title: Offline-First Apps
nodes.description: Offline data sync, conflict resolution, and background synchronization patterns.
